details.test: Task 1: Add cheapest 55 inch 4K Samsung/LG TV under 600 with 4+ stars to comparison
Task 2: Wireless headphones search, filter, and wishlist flow
Task 3: Compare two products of different brands and add higher storage to cart
Task 4: Brand page filter, sort by price, and add second-cheapest-like product to cart
Task 5: Mid-range Samsung-like product purchase with accessories lookup
Task 6: Compare two free-shipping products from different brands
Task 7: Deals context listing and add-to-cart when deals are available
Task 8: Compare two recent products and wishlist one with longer battery life
Task 9: Add up to three different-brand products in price range to comparison
